dimensions.name: reporting_month
dimensions.comment: Represents the month for which the KPIs are reported, helping track performance trends over time.

dimensions.name: customer_segment
dimensions.comment: Categorizes customers based on shared characteristics, allowing for targeted analysis of different groups.

dimensions.name: customer_age_segment
dimensions.comment: Breaks down customers into age groups, aiding in the understanding of demographic influences on portfolio performance.

dimensions.name: employment_type
dimensions.comment: Identifies the type of employment status of customers, which can impact their borrowing behavior and risk profile.

dimensions.name: geography
dimensions.comment: Indicates the geographical location of customers, providing insight into regional performance variations and market dynamics.

dimensions.name: acquisition_channel
dimensions.comment: Describes the method through which customers were acquired, essential for evaluating the effectiveness of marketing strategies.

dimensions.name: score_band
dimensions.comment: Represents the credit score range of customers, assisting in the assessment of creditworthiness and risk levels.

dimensions.name: risk_band
dimensions.comment: Categorizes customers into risk levels based on various criteria, crucial for portfolio risk management.

dimensions.name: product_type
dimensions.comment: Specifies the type of financial product associated with the loans in the portfolio, aiding in product performance analysis.

dimensions.name: ticket_size_segment
dimensions.comment: Segments loans by size or amount, providing insights into lending patterns and customer preferences.

dimensions.name: tenure_band
dimensions.comment: Groups loans by duration or term, which can influence repayment behavior and risk assessment.

dimensions.name: dpd_bucket
dimensions.comment: Indicates the Days Past Due (DPD) category of loans, useful for tracking delinquency trends and assessing portfolio health.

dimensions.name: total_loans
dimensions.comment: Summarizes the total number of loans issued within the reporting period, key for understanding portfolio scale.

dimensions.name: total_disbursed
dimensions.comment: Represents the cumulative amount of money disbursed in loans over the reporting period, important for financial metrics.

dimensions.name: total_defaults
dimensions.comment: Counts the total number of loans that have defaulted, an essential metric for gauging portfolio performance and risk.

dimensions.name: avg_default_rate
dimensions.comment: Calculates the average rate of defaults across the portfolio, essential for assessing overall credit risk.

dimensions.name: avg_bureau_score
dimensions.comment: Calculates the average credit score from credit bureaus for customers, helping in risk assessment and profiling.

dimensions.name: total_outstanding_balance
dimensions.comment: Represents the total outstanding balance for each record, indicating the amount that remains unpaid. Use this dimension to analyze or filter data based on current balances owed.

dimensions.name: total_default_amount
dimensions.comment: Represents the total default amount associated with each record in the source table. Use this dimension to analyze or filter data based on the default amount values.

dimensions.name: total_default_outstanding_balance
dimensions.comment: Represents the total outstanding balance for accounts or entities that are in default. Use this dimension to analyze or filter records based on the amount owed by defaulted parties.

measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

measures.name: LAR %
measures.comment: This measure represents the Loan Default Rate (LAR), calculated as the ratio of total defaults to total loans. It helps users assess the loan book performance.

measures.name: PAR %
measures.comment: This measure represents the Outstanding Balance of Loans in Default, calculated as the ratio of total default outstanding balances to total outstanding balances. It is useful for assessing the credit risk and performance of portfolio.

measures.name: Avg. Ticket Size
measures.comment: Represents the average size of loans disbursed, calculated by dividing the total disbursed amount by the total number of loans. Use this measure to assess lending performance and understand the typical loan size over a specified period.

dimensions.name: reporting_month
dimensions.comment: Represents the month for which the reporting is being done, indicating the time period of the lending data captured.

dimensions.name: strategy_name
dimensions.comment: Indicates the name of the lending strategy being evaluated in the simulation.

dimensions.name: total_applications
dimensions.comment: The total number of loan applications received during the reporting month.

dimensions.name: approved_count
dimensions.comment: Represents the count of loan applications that were approved during the reporting month.

dimensions.name: approval_rate
dimensions.comment: Calculated as the percentage of approved applications out of the total applications received, reflecting the effectiveness of the lending strategy.

dimensions.name: approved_disbursed
dimensions.comment: Denotes the total amount disbursed for the approved loan applications during the reporting month.

dimensions.name: approved_outstanding_balance
dimensions.comment: Represents the total outstanding balance of loans that have been approved but not fully repaid as of the reporting month.

dimensions.name: approved_defaults
dimensions.comment: The number of approved loans that have defaulted within the specified reporting period.

dimensions.name: approved_default_amount
dimensions.comment: Total monetary value of the loans that have been approved and subsequently defaulted.

dimensions.name: approved_default_outstanding_balance
dimensions.comment: Total outstanding balance associated with loans that have defaulted after approval.

dimensions.name: expected_default_rate
dimensions.comment: An estimate of the rate at which loans are expected to default based on historical data and current lending conditions.

dimensions.name: avg_loan_amount
dimensions.comment: The average amount of loans approved during the reporting month, providing insight into lending patterns.

dimensions.name: avg_bureau_score
dimensions.comment: The average credit bureau score of applicants whose loans were approved in the reporting month, indicating the creditworthiness of the applicant pool.

dimensions.name: expected_loss_proxy
dimensions.comment: Used as an indicator of potential financial loss, calculated based on the expected default rate and the total approved amount.

measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all
